description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs: one on ubuntu-latest that installs dependencies, checks out the code, and runs make, make check, and make tutorial. The other job, also on ubuntu-latest, should set up Podman, pull a fedora:rawhide image, checkout the code in a specific path, create a Dockerfile, and build a container to run tests.
